detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BabySaudiInu.openTrading() (BabySaudiInu.sol#573-599):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (BabySaudiInu.sol#583)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BabySaudiInu.sol#585)

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (BabySaudiInu.sol#585)
	State variables written after the call(s):

	BabySaudiInu.tradingOpen (BabySaudiInu.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BabySaudiInu.openTrading() (BabySaudiInu.sol#573-599)

	- BabySaudiInu._getCurrentSupply() (BabySaudiInu.sol#755-765)
	- BabySaudiInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (BabySaudiInu.sol#661-667)
	- BabySaudiInu.constructor() (BabySaudiInu.sol#307-321)
	- BabySaudiInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (BabySaudiInu.sol#413-421)
